card.desc:
- **As a:** First-time renter/Returning user
- **I want to:** access information in a centralized education hub about a particular topic 
- **So that:**  I can gain new knowledge about renting, roommate conflicts, landlords, etc
- **Assigned to: TBD**
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - A particular query will be called to web scrape and make API calls on the Internet
  - Information gathered from the call will be stored in the database
  - Refresh of the content (every 6 months)
card.name: View Education Hub - Lesson Content

card.desc:
- **As a:** App User
- **I want to:** Look at the messages from other users, whom I didn't start the conversation with first, before deciding to continue chatting. 
- **So that:** The messages I have with users I've known will be separated from the strangers' ones, and I have a choice to accept (or deny) to have a further chat with them. 
- **Assigned to: TBD**
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - The users in the request section can see if I've seen their messages or not. 
  - If I accept their request, the chat box will be moved from "requests" to the normal message page. 
  - Given their request is denied, the users will not know if I chose to deny their requests.
card.name: Accept or Deny Message Requests from Other Users

- **I want to:** search for a particular user in my messages chat
- **So that:**  I can find a user quickly
- **Assigned to: TBD**
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - Given a user types 3 letters, the closest names that will match will show first

card.desc:

- **I want to:** Bookmark education lessons to be added to my profile

card.desc:

- **I want to:** see the list of roommates I said yes to
- **So that:** I can message them easier

- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - User should see all the users they swiped ‘Yes’ to and message them
card.name: Favorite Roommates

card.desc:
- **As a:** App User
- **I want to:** Block a user
- **So that:** I cannot see their profile and they cannot see my profile
- **Assigned to: TBD**
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - Block button will be an option on user’s profile
  - The user will see “Account Not Found” after blocking a user
  - The user who was blocked will not be able to see the account at all
card.name: Block a User

card.desc:
- **As a:** App User
- **I want to:**  Report a user for inappropriate behavior
- **So that:** The user is not recommended to other people
- **Assigned to: TBD**
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - Given a user is reported, the number of reports will be stored in the database.
  - Given a user has three reports, the user will be banned

- **Acceptance Criteria:**

  - Information of user will then permanently be stored to them

- **So that:** I can connect later.

  - User is able to view only users with high compatibility scores along with some outside range (1-2)

card.desc:
- **As a:** Student renter
- **I want to:** Play short interactive quizzes or mini-games after completing a lesson
- **So that:** I can test my understanding in a fun way and stay engaged with the app
- **Assigned to:** TBD
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - After completing a lesson, the user is prompted to start a short quiz or mini-game.
  - The quiz contains at least 3–5 multiple-choice or scenario-based questions related to the lesson.
  - Immediate feedback is shown after each question (correct/incorrect with explanation).
  - The user receives a score at the end of the quiz.
  - Quiz completion updates the user’s progress tracking.
  - The quiz can be replayed.
card.name: Education Interactive Quiz/Game Feature

card.desc:
- **As a:** Student renter
- **I want to:** See an error message if a lesson fails to load
- **So that:** I know the issue and can try again
- **Assigned to:** TBD
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - If lesson data fails to load, an error message appears.
  - Error message includes a “Retry” button.
  - App does not crash if data fails.
card.name: Basic Error Handling

card.desc:
- **As a:** Guest user
- **I want to:** See which lessons are locked after reaching my limit
- **So that:** I understand why I cannot access them
- **Assigned to:** TBD
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - Locked lessons display a lock icon.
  - Clicking a locked lesson triggers the limit message.
  - Locked styling is visually distinct from unlocked lessons.
card.name: Lock Icon for Restricted Lessons

card.desc:
- **As a:** Logged-in student
- **I want to:** Mark a lesson as completed
- **So that:** My progress is tracked accurately
- **Assigned to:** TBD
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - A “Mark as Completed” button appears at the end of lesson.
  - Clicking button updates completion status.
  - Completed lesson displays checkmark icon.
card.name: Mark Lesson as Completed Button

card.desc:
- **As a:** Student renter
- **I want to:** Access the AI chatbot while reading a lesson
- **So that:** I can ask questions about the content in real time
- **Assigned to:** TBD
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - Chatbot icon appears on lesson pages.
  - Clicking icon opens chatbot panel.
  - Chatbot does not block lesson scrolling.
  - Chatbot closes properly when dismissed.
card.name: AI Chatbot Access from Lesson Page
AI Chatbot Access from Lesson Page
AI Chatbot Access from Lesson Page
AI Chatbot Access from Lesson Page
AI Chatbot Access from Lesson Page
AI Chatbot Access from Lesson Page

card.desc:
- **As a:** Logged-in student
- **I want to:** See a visual progress bar for each module
- **So that:** I know how much content I’ve completed
- **Assigned to:** TBD
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - Progress bar displays percentage of lessons completed.
  - Progress updates after finishing a lesson.
  - Progress persists after logout and login.
card.name: Lesson Progress Indicator Bar

card.desc:
- **As a:** Student renter
- **I want to:** Search for a lesson by keyword
- **So that:** I can quickly find topics I need help with
- **Assigned to:** TBD
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - A search bar is visible on the Education page.
  - Typing a keyword filters lesson results.
  - Search is case-insensitive.
  - Clearing search resets the lesson list.
card.name: Search Lessons Feature

card.desc:
- **As a:** Student renter
- **I want to:** See my navigation path (Education > Module > Lesson)
- **So that:** I know where I am in the app
- **Assigned to:** TBD
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - Breadcrumb text displays the current module and lesson.
  - Breadcrumb links navigate correctly.
  - Breadcrumb updates dynamically when navigating.
card.name: Navigation Breadcrumbs

card.desc:
- **As a:** System administrator
- **I want to:** Store lesson content in a database
- **So that:** Lessons can be dynamically rendered instead of hardcoded?!
- **Assigned to:** TBD
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - Lesson titles and descriptions are fetched from the database.
  - Editing lesson content in the database updates the UI.
  - No lesson content is hardcoded in frontend files.
card.name: Lesson Content Stored in Database

card.desc:
- **As a:** Student renter
- **I want to:** Access the Education page on mobile smoothly
- **So that:** I can have a straightforward learning experience
- **Assigned to:** TBD
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - Education page adapts to mobile screen size.
  - Lesson content remains readable without horizontal scrolling.
  - Module cards stack properly on screens.
card.name: Responsive Education Layout

card.desc:
- **As a:** Logged-in student
- **I want to:** See which lessons I have completed
- **So that:** I can track my learning progress
- **Assigned to:** TBD
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - Completed lessons are visually marked (e.g., check icon).
  - Lesson completion status persists after refresh.
  - Progress resets only if manually cleared or account deleted.
card.name: Basic Lesson Completion Tracking

  - Clicking “Create Account” navigates to the registration page.
  - After successful login, lesson access is no longer restricted.

- **I want to:** Be limited to two free lessons per month
- **So that:** I am encouraged to create an account
- **Assigned to: TBD**
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - Given I have viewed fewer than two lessons, I can open another lesson.
  - Given I attempt to open a third lesson, a limit message appears.
  - The limit message includes a “Create Account” or “Login” button.
  - The lesson does not open if the limit has been reached.
card.name: Free Lesson Limit Enforcement

card.name: Story

cards.desc:
- **As a:** App User
- **I want to:** View the Room-Linking Page after pressing the ‘Home Page’ module
- **So that:** I can start my roomlink journey
- **Assigned to:** Tiffany
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - If user clicks on home-page they should be able to select ‘First Time User’ or ‘Returning’
  - ‘First-Time User’ should be able to view the pages that explain how they work
  - ‘Returning User’ would not see these series of pages.
cards.name: Room-Link Potential Roommate (FrontEnd )

cards.desc:
- **As a:** First-time User
- **I want to:** View my finalized Roommate Page
- **So that:** I know what other users will see
- **Assigned to: Christopher**
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - Retrieve stored information and display using the base line profile layout
  - User will view the finalized result of all the information the inputted for their profile
cards.name: View Roommate Profile Page (FrontEnd)

cards.desc:
- **As a:** First-time User
- **I want to:** have a display of the survey
- **So that:** I can easily fill it out before linking
- **Assigned to: Chi**
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - Ensure user is able to view all the questions and modify them
  - Every question whether multiple choice, ranking, or text based are shown
  - Design of pages matches the high-fidelity design
cards.name: My Room-Link Survey (Frontend)

cards.desc:
- **As a:** App User
- **I want to:** view the potential roommates profiles
- **So that:**  I can connect with potential roommates
- **Assigned to: Tiffany**
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - The baseline design of potential roommate page is developed
  - The user is able to see another user’s profile and decide to swipe left or right
cards.name: Roommate Finding Page (FrontEnd)

cards.desc:
- **As a:** First-time User
- **I want to:** Save my answers on the survey
- **So that:** I can revisit to view or change my answers.
- **Assigned to: Khoa, Chi**
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - When the user answers the questions the answers are saved to the database
  - User should be able to view the saved responses if they click backwards
  - User can update their responses after they completed the survey
cards.name: My Room-Link Survey (Database)

cards.desc:
- **As a:** First-time User
- **I want to:** Make my Roommate Profile and see it actively change
- **So that:** I can present myself to potential roommates and know what my profile looks like as I am making it
- **Assigned to: Suzette**
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - User should be able to add their personal information to create profile
  - You will be able to add images, biography, and answer simple questions
  - All of the information will be stored and used to display a profile page
cards.name: Initialize Roommate Profile Page (FrontEnd + Backend)

cards.desc:
- **As a:** First-Time and Returning User
- **I want to:** View all potential roommates with similar compatibility
- **So that:** I can connect later.
- **Assigned to: Christopher**
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - User is able to view only users with high compatibility scores along with some outside range (1-2)
  - On the BackEnd an algorithm is sorting the high compatibility based on the stored answers in the database
cards.name: Room-Link Potential Roommate (Database + Backend)

cards.desc:
- **As a:** First-time User
- **I want to:** ensure my survey answers produce an accurate compatibility score
- **So that:** I can be informed before trying to match
- **Assigned to: Tiffany, Suzette**
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - User is able to view the changes made to the questions
  - The screen is able to be modified
  - Database is correctly storing and retrieving information for surveys.
cards.name: My Room-Link Survey (Backend)

cards.desc:
- **As a:** App User
- **I want to:** Text the other users who have high compatibility scores with me
- **So that:** We can exchange our interests and needs about housing and tenant requirements. 
- **Assigned to: Khoa**
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - They should be able to share messages between each other
cards.name: Message Chat Box

cards.desc:
- **As a:** Student renter
- **I want to:** View the list of education categories (Leases, Roommates, Landlords, Listings)
- **So that:** I can choose which topic I want to learn about
- **Assigned to: TBD**
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - Given I am on the Education page, I can see all four modules displayed clearly.
  - Each module is clickable.
  - Clicking a module navigates to its lesson list page.
  - The page layout matches the approved high-fidelity design.
cards.name: View Education Modules

cards.desc:
- **As a:** Student renter
- **I want to:** See a list of lessons inside a selected module
- **So that:** I can choose a specific lesson to read
- **Assigned to: TBD**
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - Given I select a module, a new page loads showing the lessons under that category.
  - Each lesson displays a title and short description.
  - Each lesson item is clickable.
  - Navigation back to the main module page works correctly.
cards.name: View Lessons Within a Module

cards.desc:
- **As a:** Student renter
- **I want to:** Open and read a lesson
- **So that:** I can learn about rental topics
- **Assigned to: TBD**
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - Given I click on a lesson, the full lesson content page loads.
  - The page displays the lesson title and formatted content.
  - A back button returns me to the lesson list.
  - The page is scrollable if content exceeds screen height.
cards.name: View Lesson Content Page

cards.desc:
- **As a:** Guest user
- **I want to:** Be redirected to the login page when I click “Create Account”
- **So that:** I can unlock unlimited lessons
- **Assigned to: TBD**
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - Clicking “Create Account” navigates to the registration page.
  - After successful login, lesson access is no longer restricted.
  - The user is redirected back to the Education module after login.
cards.name: Account Login Redirect from Lesson Limit

cards.desc:
- **As a:** Guest user
- **I want to:** Be limited to two free lessons per month
- **So that:** I am encouraged to create an account
- **Assigned to: TBD**
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - Given I have viewed fewer than two lessons, I can open another lesson.
  - Given I attempt to open a third lesson, a limit message appears.
  - The limit message includes a “Create Account” or “Login” button.
  - The lesson does not open if the limit has been reached.
cards.name: Free Lesson Limit Enforcement

cards.desc:
- **As a:** Student renter
- **I want to:** Access the AI chatbot while reading a lesson
- **So that:** I can ask questions about the content in real time
- **Assigned to:** TBD
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - Chatbot icon appears on lesson pages.
  - Clicking icon opens chatbot panel.
  - Chatbot does not block lesson scrolling.
  - Chatbot closes properly when dismissed.
cards.name: AI Chatbot Access from Lesson Page

cards.desc:
- **As a:** Logged-in student
- **I want to:** See which lessons I have completed
- **So that:** I can track my learning progress
- **Assigned to:** TBD
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - Completed lessons are visually marked (e.g., check icon).
  - Lesson completion status persists after refresh.
  - Progress resets only if manually cleared or account deleted.
cards.name: Mark Lesson as Completed Button

cards.desc:
- **As a:** Student renter
- **I want to:** Access the Education page on mobile smoothly
- **So that:** I can have a straightforward learning experience
- **Assigned to:** TBD
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - Education page adapts to mobile screen size.
  - Lesson content remains readable without horizontal scrolling.
  - Module cards stack properly on screens.
cards.name: Responsive Education Layout

cards.desc:
- **As a:** System administrator
- **I want to:** Store lesson content in a database
- **So that:** Lessons can be dynamically rendered instead of hardcoded?!
- **Assigned to:** TBD
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - Lesson titles and descriptions are fetched from the database.
  - Editing lesson content in the database updates the UI.
  - No lesson content is hardcoded in frontend files.
cards.name: Lesson Content Stored in Database

cards.desc:
- **As a:** Student renter
- **I want to:** See my navigation path (Education > Module > Lesson)
- **So that:** I know where I am in the app
- **Assigned to:** TBD
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - Breadcrumb text displays the current module and lesson.
  - Breadcrumb links navigate correctly.
  - Breadcrumb updates dynamically when navigating.
cards.name: Navigation Breadcrumbs

cards.desc:
- **As a:** Student renter
- **I want to:** Search for a lesson by keyword
- **So that:** I can quickly find topics I need help with
- **Assigned to:** TBD
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - A search bar is visible on the Education page.
  - Typing a keyword filters lesson results.
  - Search is case-insensitive.
  - Clearing search resets the lesson list.
cards.name: Search Lessons Feature

cards.desc:
- **As a:** Logged-in student
- **I want to:** See a visual progress bar for each module
- **So that:** I know how much content I’ve completed
- **Assigned to:** TBD
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - Progress bar displays percentage of lessons completed.
  - Progress updates after finishing a lesson.
  - Progress persists after logout and login.
cards.name: Lesson Progress Indicator Bar

cards.desc:
- **As a:** Logged-in student
- **I want to:** Mark a lesson as completed
- **So that:** My progress is tracked accurately
- **Assigned to:** TBD
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - A “Mark as Completed” button appears at the end of lesson.
  - Clicking button updates completion status.
  - Completed lesson displays checkmark icon.
cards.name: Mark Lesson as Completed Button

cards.desc:
- **As a:** Guest user
- **I want to:** See which lessons are locked after reaching my limit
- **So that:** I understand why I cannot access them
- **Assigned to:** TBD
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - Locked lessons display a lock icon.
  - Clicking a locked lesson triggers the limit message.
  - Locked styling is visually distinct from unlocked lessons.
cards.name: Lock Icon for Restricted Lessons

cards.desc:
- **As a:** Student renter
- **I want to:** See an error message if a lesson fails to load
- **So that:** I know the issue and can try again
- **Assigned to:** TBD
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - If lesson data fails to load, an error message appears.
  - Error message includes a “Retry” button.
  - App does not crash if data fails.
cards.name: Basic Error Handling

cards.desc:
- **As a:** First-time renter/Returning user
- **I want to:** access information in a centralized education hub about a particular topic 
- **So that:**  I can gain new knowledge about renting, roommate conflicts, landlords, etc
- **Assigned to: TBD**
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - A particular query will be called to web scrape and make API calls on the Internet
  - Information gathered from the call will be stored in the database
  - Refresh of the content (every 6 months)
cards.name: View Education Hub - Lesson Content

cards.desc:
- **As a:** Student renter
- **I want to:** View the list of education categories (Leases, Roommates, Landlords, Listings)
- **So that:** I can choose which topic I want to learn about
- **Assigned to: TBD**
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - Given I am on the Education page, I can see all four modules displayed clearly.
  - Each module is clickable.
  - Clicking a module navigates to its lesson list page.
  - The page layout matches the approved high-fidelity design.
cards.name: View Education Modules

cards.desc:
- **As a:** App User
- **I want to:** Look at the messages from other users, whom I didn't start the conversation with first, before deciding to continue chatting. 
- **So that:** The messages I have with users I've known will be separated from the strangers' ones, and I have a choice to accept (or deny) to have a further chat with them. 
- **Assigned to: TBD**
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - The users in the request section can see if I've seen their messages or not. 
  - If I accept their request, the chat box will be moved from "requests" to the normal message page. 
  - Given their request is denied, the users will not know if I chose to deny their requests.
cards.name: Accept or Deny Message Requests from Other Users

cards.desc:
- **As a:** App User
- **I want to:** search for a particular user in my messages chat
- **So that:**  I can find a user quickly
- **Assigned to: TBD**
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - Given a user types 3 letters, the closest names that will match will show first
cards.name: Search a User in Message

cards.desc:
- **As a:** Student renter
- **I want to:** See a list of lessons inside a selected module
- **So that:** I can choose a specific lesson to read
- **Assigned to: TBD**
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - Given I select a module, a new page loads showing the lessons under that category.
  - Each lesson displays a title and short description.
  - Each lesson item is clickable.
  - Navigation back to the main module page works correctly.
cards.name: View Lessons Within a Module

cards.desc:
- **As a:** App User
- **I want to:** Bookmark education lessons to be added to my profile
- **So that:** I can find them quickly and review them
- **Assigned to: TBD**
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - User can successfully access a shortlist of lessons and edit the list
cards.name: Bookmark Lessons (Database)

cards.desc:
- **As a:** App User
- **I want to:** see the list of roommates I said yes to
- **So that:** I can message them easier
- **Assigned to: TBD**
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - User should see all the users they swiped ‘Yes’ to and message them
cards.name: Favorite Roommates

cards.desc:
- **As a:** Student renter
- **I want to:** Open and read a lesson
- **So that:** I can learn about rental topics
- **Assigned to: TBD**
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - Given I click on a lesson, the full lesson content page loads.
  - The page displays the lesson title and formatted content.
  - A back button returns me to the lesson list.
  - The page is scrollable if content exceeds screen height.
cards.name: View Lesson Content Page

cards.desc:
- **As a:** Guest user
- **I want to:** Be redirected to the login page when I click “Create Account”
- **So that:** I can unlock unlimited lessons
- **Assigned to: TBD**
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - Clicking “Create Account” navigates to the registration page.
  - After successful login, lesson access is no longer restricted.
  - The user is redirected back to the Education module after login.
cards.name: Account Login Redirect from Lesson Limit

cards.desc:
- **As a:** App User
- **I want to:** Block a user
- **So that:** I cannot see their profile and they cannot see my profile
- **Assigned to: TBD**
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - Block button will be an option on user’s profile
  - The user will see “Account Not Found” after blocking a user
  - The user who was blocked will not be able to see the account at all
cards.name: Block a User

cards.desc:
- **As a:** Guest user
- **I want to:** Be limited to two free lessons per month
- **So that:** I am encouraged to create an account
- **Assigned to: TBD**
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - Given I have viewed fewer than two lessons, I can open another lesson.
  - Given I attempt to open a third lesson, a limit message appears.
  - The limit message includes a “Create Account” or “Login” button.
  - The lesson does not open if the limit has been reached.
cards.name: Free Lesson Limit Enforcement

cards.desc:
- **As a:** App User
- **I want to:**  Report a user for inappropriate behavior
- **So that:** The user is not recommended to other people
- **Assigned to: TBD**
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - Given a user is reported, the number of reports will be stored in the database.
  - Given a user has three reports, the user will be banned
cards.name: Report Inappropriate Behavior from a User

cards.desc:
- **As a:** App User
- **I want to:**  Log out of my account
- **So that:** I can ensure my account is secure
- **Assigned to: TBD**
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - User should be able to exit and application will be converted into first-time user application
  - No data remains in the application
cards.name: Logging Out of Account

cards.desc:
**Story**

As a user, I need to answer the questions to the survey, so I can get a compability score

**Story Points**

Hard, 10

**Description**

Based on the answers user inputs we develop a database and algorithm that uses the inputs then using an algorithm ranks.
cards.name: Roommate Answer Survey

cards.desc:
- **As a:** App User
- **I want to:** Fill out (or edit) my account information (e.g., name, phone number, update password...)
- **So that:** My account information will be up-to-date.
- **Assigned to: TBD**
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - View past information entered
  - Modify past information and save it to database
cards.name: General App Profile

cards.desc:
- **As a:** App User
- **I want to:** Reset my account password because I forgot my old one
- **So that:** I can access to my account normally again
- **Assigned to: TBD**
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - User is able to get reset password page and set up new password
  - The user's old password will be deleted and replaced by their new one in the database
cards.name: Reset Password

cards.desc:
- **As a:** App User
- **I want to:** Create an account to access the app with full features.
- **So that:** I can use the app with no limitations and save my preferences on roommates, education lessons, etc. 
- **Assigned to: TBD**
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - Can add their email and password to create a personalized account
  - Information of user will then permanently be stored to them
cards.name: Sign-up Page (Create an account)

cards.desc:
- **As a:** App User
- **I want to:** Log-in to access the app after using 2 free lessons
- **So that:** I can use the app comfortably, especially for accessing the education hub with no prevention
- **Assigned to: TBD**
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - User can input their email and password to access personalized account
  - The information is retrieved and their previous settings appear
cards.name: Log-in Page after Education hub "free" access

cards.desc:
**Story**
Develop an algorithm to calculate compatibility score between users who are room-linking

**Story Points**

cards.desc:
- **As a:** App User
- **I want to:** Change my Survey responses if signed-in
- **So that:** I can accurately reflect/change my lifestyle choices
- **Assigned to: TBD**
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - User can update their responses even after they completed the survey
cards.name: Change Survey Response Questions

cards.desc:
- **As a:** App User
- **I want to:** Have a main space to access all app features (e.g., roommate linking, education hub, messages...)
- **So that:** It is more convenient for me to find the features if they are gathered in one place
- **Assigned to: Khoa**
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - They should be able to view all of the options of app navigation
  - Can click a module and they will be guided to a different page
cards.name: Home Page(Front End and Back End)

cards.desc:
- **As a:** App User
- **I want to:** Change my profile when I sign-in
- **So that:** I can accurately reflect my interest
- **Assigned to:  TBD**
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - User should be able to make changes to the initial roommate file they created
  - The user can save the changes and the database will store it
cards.name: Modify Roommate Profile (FrontEnd+Database Retrieval + Save Changes)

cards.desc:
As a: First-Time User

I want to: sign-in application

So that: I can access more potential users

Priority: Medium

Effort: Easy

Team member assigned:

Acceptance Criteria:

- User will be prompted to a new screen after they completed their free trial
- The page will be a notification that they will have to pay/sign-in
cards.name: Sign-in for First-Time Users

- **I want to:** Play short interactive quizzes or mini-games after completing a lesson
- **So that:** I can test my understanding in a fun way and stay engaged with the app
- **Assigned to:** TBD
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - After completing a lesson, the user is prompted to start a short quiz or mini-game.
  - The quiz contains at least 3–5 multiple-choice or scenario-based questions related to the lesson.
  - Immediate feedback is shown after each question (correct/incorrect with explanation).
  - The user receives a score at the end of the quiz.
  - Quiz completion updates the user’s progress tracking.
  - The quiz can be replayed.

- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - A search bar is visible on the Education page.
  - Typing a keyword filters lesson results.
  - Search is case-insensitive.
  - Clearing search resets the lesson list.
cards.name: Search Lessons Feature

cards.desc:
- **As a:** Logged-in student
- **I want to:** See a visual progress bar for each module
- **So that:** I know how much content I’ve completed
- **Assigned to:** TBD
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - Progress bar displays percentage of lessons completed.
  - Progress updates after finishing a lesson.
  - Progress persists after logout and login.
cards.name: Lesson Progress Indicator Bar

cards.desc:
- **As a:** Logged-in student
- **I want to:** Mark a lesson as completed
- **So that:** My progress is tracked accurately
- **Assigned to:** TBD
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - A “Mark as Completed” button appears at the end of lesson.
  - Clicking button updates completion status.
  - Completed lesson displays checkmark icon.
cards.name: Mark Lesson as Completed Button

cards.desc:
- **As a:** Guest user
- **I want to:** See which lessons are locked after reaching my limit
- **So that:** I understand why I cannot access them
- **Assigned to:** TBD
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - Locked lessons display a lock icon.
  - Clicking a locked lesson triggers the limit message.
  - Locked styling is visually distinct from unlocked lessons.
cards.name: Lock Icon for Restricted Lessons

cards.desc:
- **As a:** Student renter
- **I want to:** See an error message if a lesson fails to load
- **So that:** I know the issue and can try again
- **Assigned to:** TBD
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - If lesson data fails to load, an error message appears.
  - Error message includes a “Retry” button.
  - App does not crash if data fails.
cards.name: Basic Error Handling

cards.desc:
- **As a:** Student renter
- **I want to:** Play short interactive quizzes or mini-games after completing a lesson
- **So that:** I can test my understanding in a fun way and stay engaged with the app
- **Assigned to:** TBD
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - After completing a lesson, the user is prompted to start a short quiz or mini-game.
  - The quiz contains at least 3–5 multiple-choice or scenario-based questions related to the lesson.
  - Immediate feedback is shown after each question (correct/incorrect with explanation).
  - The user receives a score at the end of the quiz.
  - Quiz completion updates the user’s progress tracking.
  - The quiz can be replayed.
cards.name: Education Interactive Quiz/Game Feature

cards.desc:
- **As a:** App User
- **I want to:** See and modify the list of people I've messaged since starting to use the app
- **So that:** I can revisit the messages with other users
- **Assigned to: Chi**
- **Acceptance Criteria:**
  - User will see new potential roommates that want to connect with them 
  - View all the messages they have with people they’ve had conversations with.
cards.name: Message Page

checkItems.name: User should be able to add their personal information to create profile
You will be able to add image, biography, and answer simple questions
All of the information will be stored and used to display a profile page
